nasb.text: Then Baruch said to them, “He dictated all these words to me, and I wrote them with ink on the book.”

esv.text: Baruch answered them, “He dictated all these words to me, while I wrote them with ink on the scroll.”

cnv.text: 巴錄對他們說：“這一切話是他親口向我講述的，我就用墨寫在書上。”

ccb.text: 巴录说：“是耶利米口授、我记录在卷轴上的。”
